form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of 11 weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation ninth of 12 at this track January 29 over 1600m, 9 len behind Astral Gate with 54kg at $133.50. Previously first up; tenth of 15 at this track December 5 over 1200m, 9 len behind Rick with 54kg at $27. Definite top-three contender.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 14 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 8 len behind Aurore Ciel with 54kg at $145.60. Second run from a spell 5th of 10 at this track on March 25 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Scratch Clutch with 54kg at $44.40. One of the roughies.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months got back early 8th of 14 at this track on March 25 over 1200m, 9 len behind Nyan Moro carrying 56kg at $21.70. Previously second-up got back early 8th of 10 at this track on September 17 over 1200m, 8 len behind Conti Nuts carrying 54kg at $20.80. Solid top-three hope.
